title: Video by sam.prasad__
result_description: You jump, freeze at the apex, and your frozen self floats upward and away — bending reality on the reveal.

inputs.name: jump_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Jump; make sure the apex (top of the jump) is clearly captured.

edit_steps.note: freeze at the top of the jump

result.description: You jump, freeze at the apex, and your frozen self floats upward and away — bending reality on the reveal.
success_criteria: Float motion is smooth across keyframes
Zoom 2 sells the drift on the reveal

narration_transcript: put your clip into cap cut and pause when you are in the air. Tap freeze right at that spot. Now tap on the first clip, duplicate it and add it as in overly. Again, add another freeze like before at the same point as earlier. Go to remove each custom, select only the person, add a keyframe at the start, move forward, add another keyframe, repeat this until you reach the lab. On the last keyframe, go to animations, choose zone 2 for the effect and that's how your video looks.

shrinkflation_use: Toss a bag of chips up, freeze it mid-air, overlay text '2.3 OZ vanished', then cut to you catching the lighter bag — the missing weight literally floats away.
